item.name: workforce planning api talent matrix list

request.name: workforce planning api talent matrix list

description.content:
ViewSet for managing 9-Box Talent Matrix assessments.

Provides:
- CRUD operations for talent assessments
- Filtering by user, assessment period, box category
- Summary statistics endpoint
- 9-box distribution view

* `box1` - 1. Qutu - Zəif Nəticə
* `box2` - 2. Qutu - İnkişaf Ehtiyacı
* `box3` - 3. Qutu - Yüksək Potensial
* `box4` - 4. Qutu - Əsas Kadr
* `box5` - 5. Qutu - Güclü İfaçı
* `box6` - 6. Qutu - Gələcək Lider
* `box7` - 7. Qutu - İstedad
* `box8` - 8. Qutu - Yüksək İfaçı
* `box9` - 9. Qutu - Üstün İstedad (This can only be one of box1,box2,box3,box4,box5,box6,box7,box8,box9)
Which field to use when ordering the results.
A page number within the paginated result set.

* `low` - Aşağı Performans
* `medium` - Orta Performans
* `high` - Yüksək Performans (This can only be one of high,low,medium)

* `low` - Aşağı Potensial
* `medium` - Orta Potensial
* `high` - Yüksək Potensial (This can only be one of high,low,medium)
